name: @todo-app/api
description: Turborepo Todo API with full CRUD

scripts.lint: echo 'Linting Turborepo API...' && echo '✅ API code looks good!'
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && echo '⏳ Waiting for Turborepo database...' && sleep 5
scripts.db:connect: docker-compose exec db psql -U postgres -d turborepo_todos_db
